name: Flux.2 inpainting — paint a mask + reference image
description:
Replace part of an image with the help of a second reference image. Upload the picture you want to change, paint over the area to replace, upload a reference image (the look, subject, or object to bring in), and type a short instruction — Flux.2 Klein regenerates only the painted region, guided by the reference and your prompt, and blends it back into the original.

• **Paint the mask**: brush over the region you want the model to redo. Only the painted area changes; everything else is kept.
• **Reference image**: the object/subject/style to insert (e.g. a pair of sunglasses, a new background).
• **What to put there**: a short instruction describing the result.

Runs fast (4-step distilled Klein model).
author: Template - ComfyUI

exposedParameters.label: Image to edit — paint the area to replace
What to put in the masked area
exposedParameters.default: Add the reference image's subject into the masked area, matching the lighting and perspective.
